title: Shop Hourly Rate Calculator
description: Calculates the true hourly cost of operating a manufacturing shop, incorporating direct labor, overhead, machine costs, and efficiency losses per industrial engineering standards (ISO 9000, Lean, Six Sigma, WERC).

inputs.label: Direct Labor Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage paid to direct production workers, including base pay and shift differentials.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly wage paid to direct production workers, including base pay and shift differentials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan üretim işçilerine ödenen ortalama saatlik ücret, temel ücret ve vardiya farkları dahil.

inputs.label: Number of Direct Labor Employees
inputs.businessContext: Total headcount of workers directly involved in production.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total headcount of workers directly involved in production.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan üretimde çalışan toplam personel sayısı.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Hours per Employee
inputs.businessContext: Standard annual hours per employee (e.g., 52 weeks * 40 hours). Adjust for overtime or part-time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard annual hours per employee (e.g., 52 weeks * 40 hours). Adjust for overtime or part-time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışan başına standart yıllık saat (ör. 52 hafta * 40 saat). Fazla mesai veya yarı zamanlı için ayarlayın.

inputs.label: Total Annual Overhead Costs
inputs.businessContext: All indirect costs: rent, utilities, management salaries, insurance, taxes, maintenance, IT, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: All indirect costs: rent, utilities, management salaries, insurance, taxes, maintenance, IT, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm dolaylı maliyetler: kira, kamu hizmetleri, yönetim maaşları, sigorta, vergiler, bakım, BT vb.

inputs.label: Total Annual Machine Costs
inputs.businessContext: Depreciation, lease payments, repairs, tooling, and energy costs for all production equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Depreciation, lease payments, repairs, tooling, and energy costs for all production equipment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm üretim ekipmanları için amortisman, kira ödemeleri, onarımlar, takım ve enerji maliyetleri.

inputs.label: Average Shop Efficiency (%)
inputs.businessContext: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or labor efficiency, accounting for downtime, setup, and speed loss.

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) or labor efficiency, accounting for downtime, setup, and speed loss.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genel ekipman etkinliği (OEE) veya işçilik verimliliği; duruş, kurulum ve hız kaybını hesaba katar.

inputs.label: Quality Yield (%)
inputs.businessContext: First-pass yield or overall yield; rework and scrap increase effective hourly cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: First-pass yield or overall yield; rework and scrap increase effective hourly cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk geçiş verimi veya genel verim; yeniden işleme ve fire efektif saatlik maliyeti artırır.

inputs.label: Shift Premium Factor
inputs.businessContext: 1.0 for single shift, 1.1 for two-shift, 1.2 for three-shift operations (accounts for shift differentials).

businessContext_i18n.en: 1.0 for single shift, 1.1 for two-shift, 1.2 for three-shift operations (accounts for shift differentials).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek vardiya için 1.0, iki vardiya için 1.1, üç vardiya için 1.2 (vardiya farklarını hesaba katar).

rules.message: Efficiency below 50% indicates severe operational issues; consider Lean assessment.
Yield below 80% suggests significant quality problems; Six Sigma project recommended.
Overhead exceeds 50% of direct labor cost; review overhead structure.

thresholds.message: Shop hourly rate exceeds $150/hr; benchmark against industry.
Efficiency critically low; immediate process improvement needed.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
